items.title: This CLI slashes LLM token waste
items.oneliner: Pluggable CLI filter cut one developer's LLM token usage by 91.8 percent before prompts hit the model.

items.title: Postgres gets durable workflow execution
items.oneliner: Open-source extension runs fault-tolerant long jobs inside PostgreSQL with checkpointing, retries, and SQL-defined workflows.

items.title: This CLI automates code review
items.oneliner: Alibaba's open-source reviewer analyzes full file context to catch defects across large changesets from the command line.

items.title: Git diffs become code entity aware
items.oneliner: Entity-level Git tooling shows function, class, and method changes instead of raw lines for faster debugging.

items.title: Self-host JavaScript workers with WASM
items.oneliner: Experimental CLI compiles JavaScript or TypeScript handlers into isolated WebAssembly workers without Node, Bun, or Docker.

items.title: Sandbox Python with MicroPython WASM
items.oneliner: Practical walkthrough shows how to run untrusted Python plugins in a WebAssembly sandbox with strict resource limits.

items.title: One CLI for thirty databases
items.oneliner: Rust ADBC client queries 30 plus databases with one interface, REPL, and export formats for scripts.

items.title: Isolate dev environments by worktree
items.oneliner: Git worktree helper assigns stable numbers so ports, databases, and env vars stay isolated per branch.

items.title: Install GitHub binaries through uv
items.oneliner: uv wrapper pulls release binaries from GitHub, verifies SHA256 hashes, and caches tools from pyproject.toml.

items.title: Animated Vue icons ship free
items.oneliner: Open-source Vue icon library adds motion-ready UI icons you can drop into apps without designing animations.
